channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 5 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

Sem notícias para seção de Infraestrutura.

────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-35616 associada a Qualys. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/fortinet-patches-actively-exploited-cve.html
 
🚨 Hackers exploit React2Shell in automated credential theft campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are running a large-scale campaign to steal credentials in an automated way after exploiting React2Shell (CVE-2025-55182) in vulnerable Next.js apps.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-react2shell-in-automated-credential-theft-campaign/
 
🚨 CVE-2026-31405 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: media: dvb-net: fix OOB access in ULE extension header tables The ule_mandatory_ext_handlers[] and ule_optional_ext_handlers[] tables in handle_one_ule_extension() are declared with 255 elements (valid indices 0-254), but the index htype is derived from network-controlled data as (ule_sndu_type & 0x00FF), giving a range of 0-255. When htype equals 25...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31405
 
💣 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Axios Hack, Chrome 0-Day, Fortinet Exploits, Paragon Spyware and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Active bugs showed up in the tools people use every day. Some attacks didn’t even need much effort because the path was already there. What starts small can reach a lot of systems fast.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/weekly-recap-axios-hack-chrome-0-day.html
 
💣 36 Malicious npm Packages Exploited Redis, PostgreSQL to Deploy Persistent Implants
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered 36 malicious packages in the npm registry that are disguised as Strapi CMS plugins but come with different payloads to facilitate Redis and PostgreSQL exploitation, deploy reverse shells, harvest credentials, and drop a persistent implant. "Every package contains three files (package.json, index.js, postinstall.js), has no description, repository,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/36-malicious-npm-packages-exploited.html
 
📰 Why Simple Breach Monitoring is No Longer Enough
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Infostealers are harvesting credentials and session cookies at scale, bypassing traditional defenses. Lunar explains why simple breach monitoring alone can't keep up with modern credential-based attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/why-simple-breach-monitoring-is-no-longer-enough/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8150-1: SPIP vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform cross site scripting. (CVE-2022-28959) It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform PHP injection attacks. (CVE-2022-28960) It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote atta...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8150-1
 
💣 Hackers Exploit Fake Microsoft Teams Domains to Deliver Malicious Payloads - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9Pak1nSTVfWmdyYmFSQlp3dWhQQlE0eUdvTUFIOXN0SUVjQU9jYkt1TzUyZlA4V2loSmFSTG55bDdFUmptNHRLWW9yalRBb19sTFA2QkpjRWR4dURRS1lHT0F30gFiQVVfeXFMT09qTWdJNV9aZ3JiYVJCWnd1aFBCUTR5R29NQUg5c3RJRWNBT2NiS3VPNTJmUDhXaWhKYVJMbnlsN0VSam00dEtZb3JqVEFvX2xMUDZCSmNFZHh1RFFLWUdPQXc?oc=5
 
📰 Axios npm hack used fake Teams error fix to hijack maintainer account - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxPSEVxb3c1V0VQQnIyR2FZaTh3QTV5c2lob2xiT1FnNVlRcEN2RFJtR1l1YlhGeUotb0owRG8tbUZyNVBUeTROd3BDYjNfaFowOXZ5VDNobjkyWVBlUVBPb2h1NGg4WFBFa1NJT0pRcEd6NmFHeG9nM212aFZScmZfT2s4Rjdob1VNVHZDa2JsN2hwQk1aR3FCSkN2eWFMcnZ4bF9FZmtzMUM4SU55UXVyc09VbVQxMHZu0gG-AUFVX3lxTE54NlBlc09HeEp3a1dncXNKaUhtc25abmFUS05GdTdqZXU0cFo5ei0tZk1ubHFMT0JHTVVnX09rZm16dU5ycy1WVW5HRlp5MzM5Ny1mbjNZdmRPUFpDVnA5ekZrdDlFVER3OTJJeWdVRDBNT09BQTBCRFFQWk1DUWJPTWZyS2NNMF81VGlQZlFNcGhJLWNYVGgxWU0ydmJQMDJkVUQtVWVSWEF2MWstSnhnejR0a0FzTi11WXRxSFE?oc=5
 
📰 Security Breach At Delhi Assembly Complex: Masked Man In Car Rams Gate, Drives Away - Outlook India
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Hackers Compromised ILSpy WordPress Domain to Deliver Malware - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a WordPress, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 04/04/2026 até 06/04/2026.
